limitations: ai_investment_intensity: No quantified AI-specific capex or dedicated AI budget disclosed in excerpts; GEV's AI exposure is primarily as a supplier to AI infrastructure customers, not as a direct AI investor.

ai_narrative_concreteness: AI use cases are described at a high level (grid electrification for data centers, AI integration in production) without deployment status or quantified results; score reflects named but undeployed/unquantified initiatives.

ai_risk_disclosure_depth: Risk-section material is present; risks include regulatory (EU AI Act), data privacy/generative AI compliance mechanisms, and stock price volatility linked to AI sentiment — these are company-specific mechanisms, justifying score 4, though no quantified risk treatment or named oversight body is disclosed.
